FinalProjectSpeeches

Misja Bjørk Lauridsen

2026-05-27

#Importation of data
anker80_path <- here::here("data", "anker80.pdf")
#Extraction of text from PDF
anker80_text <- pdf_text(anker80_path)
# Split speech text into individual lines and remove whitespace
anker80_df <- data.frame(anker80_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(anker80_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
# Break speech text into individual word tokens
 anker80_tokens <- anker80_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
# Remove common stopwords that do not carry semantic meaning
anker80_wc <- anker80_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
anker80_wc
## # A tibble: 1,620 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 i       215
##  2 og      176
##  3 at      140
##  4 en      129
##  5 det     120
##  6 af      112
##  7 er      108
##  8 for     108
##  9 den      97
## 10 de       90
## # ℹ 1,610 more rows
anker80_stop <- anker80_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-anker80_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
anker80_swc <- anker80_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
anker80_no_numeric <- anker80_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
# Match speech words with Sentida sentiment scores
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))
Sentida_neg

anker80_Sentida <- anker80_stop %>% 
  inner_join(sentida_lexicon, by = c("word" = "stem"))
anker80_Sentida
## # A tibble: 379 × 3
##    word          X  score
##    <chr>     <int>  <dbl>
##  1 godt       1636  2.67 
##  2 ondt       3100 -2    
##  3 udvikling  4749  2.33 
##  4 økonomisk  5233  0.333
##  5 ny         3004  1.83 
##  6 fortsat    1340  0.167
##  7 høj        1894  1.17 
##  8 overalt    3205  0.333
##  9 undgå      4845 -1    
## 10 permanent  3317  0.333
## # ℹ 369 more rows
# Count how many words belong to each sentiment category
anker80_Sentida_hist <- anker80_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
# Calculate average sentiment score for the speech
anker80_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.515
#mean is 0.515
# Visualise sentiment distribution
ggplot(data = anker80_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

baunsgaard68_path <- here::here("data", "baunsgaard68.pdf")
baunsgaard68_text <- pdf_text(baunsgaard68_path)
baunsgaard68_df <- data.frame(baunsgaard68_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(baunsgaard68_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 baunsgaard68_tokens <- baunsgaard68_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
baunsgaard68_wc <- baunsgaard68_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
baunsgaard68_wc
## # A tibble: 462 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 at       41
##  2 i        35
##  3 der      29
##  4 det      27
##  5 en       26
##  6 og       26
##  7 af       23
##  8 til      23
##  9 den      22
## 10 er       22
## # ℹ 452 more rows
baunsgaard68_stop <- baunsgaard68_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-baunsgaard68_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
baunsgaard68_swc <- baunsgaard68_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
baunsgaard68_no_numeric <- baunsgaard68_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))
Sentida_neg

baunsgaard68_Sentida <- baunsgaard68_stop %>% 
  inner_join(sentida_lexicon, by = c("word" = "stem"))
baunsgaard68_Sentida
## # A tibble: 98 × 3
##    word          X  score
##    <chr>     <int>  <dbl>
##  1 henhold    1753 -0.333
##  2 dag         652  0.167
##  3 folketing  1148  0.333
##  4 natur      2936  1.17 
##  5 få         1529  1    
##  6 regering   3551  0.333
##  7 dag         652  0.167
##  8 stilling   4146  0.333
##  9 grad       1640  0.333
## 10 dag         652  0.167
## # ℹ 88 more rows
baunsgaard68_Sentida_hist <- baunsgaard68_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
baunsgaard68_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.469
#mean is 0.469
ggplot(data = baunsgaard68_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

baunsgaard69_path <- here::here("data", "baunsgaard69.pdf")
baunsgaard69_text <- pdf_text(baunsgaard69_path)
baunsgaard69_df <- data.frame(baunsgaard69_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(baunsgaard69_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 baunsgaard69_tokens <- baunsgaard69_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
baunsgaard69_wc <- baunsgaard69_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
baunsgaard69_wc
## # A tibble: 1,409 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 i       161
##  2 at      153
##  3 af      139
##  4 og      119
##  5 en      107
##  6 for     104
##  7 det      94
##  8 den      86
##  9 til      84
## 10 de       82
## # ℹ 1,399 more rows
baunsgaard69_stop <- baunsgaard69_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-baunsgaard69_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
baunsgaard69_swc <- baunsgaard69_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
baunsgaard69_no_numeric <- baunsgaard69_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))
Sentida_neg

baunsgaard69_Sentida <- baunsgaard69_stop %>% 
  inner_join(sentida_lexicon, by = c("word" = "stem"))
baunsgaard69_Sentida
## # A tibble: 358 × 3
##    word             X  score
##    <chr>        <int>  <dbl>
##  1 forudsætning  1351  0.667
##  2 økonomisk     5233  0.333
##  3 jord          2124 -0.333
##  4 ny            3004  1.83 
##  5 stat          4128  0.333
##  6 gennemført    1574  3    
##  7 ny            3004  1.83 
##  8 samt          3742  0.667
##  9 beslutning     428  0.333
## 10 reform        3547  0.333
## # ℹ 348 more rows
baunsgaard69_Sentida_hist <- baunsgaard69_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
baunsgaard69_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.484
#mean is 0.484
ggplot(data = baunsgaard69_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

baunsgaard70_path <- here::here("data", "baunsgaard70.pdf")
baunsgaard70_text <- pdf_text(baunsgaard70_path)
baunsgaard70_df <- data.frame(baunsgaard70_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(baunsgaard70_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 baunsgaard70_tokens <- baunsgaard70_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
baunsgaard70_wc <- baunsgaard70_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
baunsgaard70_wc
## # A tibble: 1,408 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 at      182
##  2 i       149
##  3 og      130
##  4 det     124
##  5 af      108
##  6 en      100
##  7 er       89
##  8 den      88
##  9 for      82
## 10 til      82
## # ℹ 1,398 more rows
baunsgaard70_stop <- baunsgaard70_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-baunsgaard70_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
baunsgaard70_swc <- baunsgaard70_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
baunsgaard70_no_numeric <- baunsgaard70_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))
Sentida_neg

## 388 5240             øretæv    -3
baunsgaard70_Sentida <- baunsgaard70_stop %>% 
  inner_join(sentida_lexicon, by = c("word" = "stem"))
baunsgaard70_Sentida
## # A tibble: 335 × 3
##    word             X  score
##    <chr>        <int>  <dbl>
##  1 fremgang      1406  1.67 
##  2 samfund       3724  0.667
##  3 mangel        2681 -2    
##  4 økonomi       5232  0.667
##  5 forudsætning  1351  0.667
##  6 politik       3361 -0.333
##  7 sammenhæng    3731  0.667
##  8 aktuel         120  0.333
##  9 politik       3361 -0.333
## 10 sund          4231  2.22 
## # ℹ 325 more rows
baunsgaard70_Sentida_hist <- baunsgaard70_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
baunsgaard70_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.389
#mean is 0.389
ggplot(data = baunsgaard70_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

baunsgaard71_path <- here::here("data", "baunsgaard71.pdf")
baunsgaard71_text <- pdf_text(baunsgaard71_path)
baunsgaard71_df <- data.frame(baunsgaard71_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(baunsgaard71_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 baunsgaard71_tokens <- baunsgaard71_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
baunsgaard71_wc <- baunsgaard71_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
baunsgaard71_wc
## # A tibble: 462 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 at       41
##  2 i        35
##  3 der      29
##  4 det      27
##  5 en       26
##  6 og       26
##  7 af       23
##  8 til      23
##  9 den      22
## 10 er       22
## # ℹ 452 more rows
baunsgaard71_stop <- baunsgaard71_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-baunsgaard71_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
baunsgaard71_swc <- baunsgaard71_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
baunsgaard71_no_numeric <- baunsgaard71_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))
Sentida_neg

baunsgaard71_Sentida
## # A tibble: 98 × 3
##    word          X  score
##    <chr>     <int>  <dbl>
##  1 henhold    1753 -0.333
##  2 dag         652  0.167
##  3 folketing  1148  0.333
##  4 natur      2936  1.17 
##  5 få         1529  1    
##  6 regering   3551  0.333

##  8 stilling   4146  0.333
##  9 grad       1640  0.333
## 10 dag         652  0.167

baunsgaard71_Sentida_hist <- baunsgaard71_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
baunsgaard71_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.469
#mean is 0.469
ggplot(data = baunsgaard71_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

fogh07_path <- here::here("data", "fogh07.pdf")
fogh07_text <- pdf_text(fogh07_path)
fogh07_df <- data.frame(fogh07_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(fogh07_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 fogh07_tokens <- fogh07_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
fogh07_wc <- fogh07_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
fogh07_wc
## # A tibble: 1,400 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 og      211
##  2 i       151
##  3 at      150
##  4 vi      131
##  5 for     123
##  6 en      106

##  8 det      84
##  9 vil      79
## 10 de       76

fogh07_stop <- fogh07_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-fogh07_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
fogh07_swc <- fogh07_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
fogh07_no_numeric <- fogh07_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion

  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))

fogh07_Sentida <- fogh07_stop %>% 
  inner_join(sentida_lexicon, by = c("word" = "stem"))
fogh07_Sentida
## # A tibble: 482 × 3
##    word                  X  score
##    <chr>             <int>  <dbl>
##  1 verdensmesterskab  5069  0.667
##  2 helt               1749  1.33 
##  3 demokrati           689  0.333
##  4 demokrati           689  0.333
##  5 fri                1433  1.17 
##  6 godt               1636  2.67 
##  7 mesterskab         2747  1.33 
##  8 vagt               4962 -0.333
##  9 liv                2564  1.53 
## 10 frihed             1439  2.67 
## # ℹ 472 more rows
fogh07_Sentida_hist <- fogh07_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
fogh07_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.454
#mean is 0.454
ggplot(data = fogh07_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

frederiksen19_path <- here::here("data", "frederiksen19.pdf")
frederiksen19_text <- pdf_text(frederiksen19_path)
frederiksen19_df <- data.frame(frederiksen19_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(frederiksen19_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 frederiksen19_tokens <- frederiksen19_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
frederiksen19_wc <- frederiksen19_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
frederiksen19_wc
## # A tibble: 1,324 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 det     153
##  2 er      141
##  3 i       141
##  4 vi      132
##  5 og      118
##  6 at      117
##  7 til      92
##  8 for      89
##  9 jeg      78
## 10 der      74
## # ℹ 1,314 more rows
frederiksen19_stop <- frederiksen19_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-frederiksen19_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
frederiksen19_swc <- frederiksen19_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
frederiksen19_no_numeric <- frederiksen19_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))
Sentida_neg

frederiksen19_Sentida <- frederiksen19_stop %>% 
  inner_join(sentida_lexicon, by = c("word" = "stem"))
frederiksen19_Sentida
## # A tibble: 461 × 3
##    word       X  score
##    <chr>  <int>  <dbl>
##  1 uden    4671 -0.667
##  2 dan      656  0.889
##  3 små     4015 -0.667
##  4 enkelt   936  0.667
##  5 ord     3186  0.5  
##  6 tillid  4427  2.33 
##  7 tillid  4427  2.33 
##  8 ja      2114  2.5  
##  9 tillid  4427  2.33 
## 10 tillid  4427  2.33 
## # ℹ 451 more rows
frederiksen19_Sentida_hist <- frederiksen19_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
frederiksen19_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.545
#mean is 0.545
ggplot(data = frederiksen19_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

frederiksen20_path <- here::here("data", "frederiksen20.pdf")
frederiksen20_text <- pdf_text(frederiksen20_path)
frederiksen20_df <- data.frame(frederiksen20_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(frederiksen20_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 frederiksen20_tokens <- frederiksen20_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
frederiksen20_wc <- frederiksen20_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
frederiksen20_wc
## # A tibble: 1,708 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 vi      209
##  2 i       185
##  3 det     160
##  4 og      160
##  5 at      137
##  6 er      134
##  7 for     115
##  8 en       88
##  9 på       83
## 10 som      83
## # ℹ 1,698 more rows
frederiksen20_stop <- frederiksen20_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-frederiksen20_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
frederiksen20_swc <- frederiksen20_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
frederiksen20_no_numeric <- frederiksen20_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))
Sentida_neg

frederiksen20_Sentida
## # A tibble: 483 × 3
##    word            X  score
##    <chr>       <int>  <dbl>
##  1 stof         4156 -1.33 
##  2 global       1625  0.333
##  3 stof         4156 -1.33 
##  4 fællesskab   1500  1.67 
##  5 handlekraft  1726  1.67 
##  6 tusindvis    4574  0.667
##  7 liv          2564  1.53 
##  8 virus        5113 -3.33 
##  9 ihjel        1939 -3.67 
## 10 virus        5113 -3.33 
## # ℹ 473 more rows
frederiksen20_Sentida_hist <- frederiksen20_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
frederiksen20_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.447
#mean is 0.447
ggplot(data = frederiksen20_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

frederiksen21_path <- here::here("data", "frederiksen21.pdf")
frederiksen21_text <- pdf_text(frederiksen21_path)
frederiksen21_df <- data.frame(frederiksen21_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(frederiksen21_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 frederiksen21_tokens <- frederiksen21_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
frederiksen21_wc <- frederiksen21_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
frederiksen21_wc
## # A tibble: 1,503 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 og      178
##  2 i       158
##  3 det     130
##  4 er      122
##  5 at      110
##  6 for     106
##  7 vi      102
##  8 en       92
##  9 til      88
## 10 med      63
## # ℹ 1,493 more rows
frederiksen21_stop <- frederiksen21_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-frederiksen21_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
frederiksen21_swc <- frederiksen21_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
frederiksen21_no_numeric <- frederiksen21_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))
Sentida_neg

## # A tibble: 462 × 3
##    word         X  score
##    <chr>    <int>  <dbl>
##  1 fremtid   1429  1    
##  2 helt      1749  1.33 
##  3 ren       3574  1.67 
##  4 trygt     4545  3    
##  5 uden      4671 -0.667

  count(score)
frederiksen21_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))

##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.683
#mean is 0.683

  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

hartling74_path <- here::here("data", "hartling74.pdf")
hartling74_text <- pdf_text(hartling74_path)
hartling74_df <- data.frame(hartling74_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(hartling74_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 hartling74_tokens <- hartling74_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
hartling74_wc <- hartling74_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
hartling74_wc
## # A tibble: 1,244 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>

##  2 i       141

##  6 af       96
##  7 for      91
##  8 den      76
##  9 en       76
## 10 de       73
## # ℹ 1,234 more rows
hartling74_stop <- hartling74_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-hartling74_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
hartling74_swc <- hartling74_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
hartling74_no_numeric <- hartling74_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))

hartling74_Sentida <- hartling74_stop %>% 
  inner_join(sentida_lexicon, by = c("word" = "stem"))
hartling74_Sentida
## # A tibble: 342 × 3
##    word            X  score
##    <chr>       <int>  <dbl>
##  1 dag           652  0.167
##  2 nyt          3016  1.11 
##  3 folk         1141  0.556
##  4 kritisk      2394 -2    
##  5 regering     3551  0.333
##  6 folketing    1148  0.333
##  7 spørgsmål    4115  0.667
##  8 betragtning   456  0.333
##  9 ord          3186  0.5  
## 10 tilsagn      4438  0.333
## # ℹ 332 more rows
hartling74_Sentida_hist <- hartling74_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
hartling74_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.518
#mean is 0.518
ggplot(data = hartling74_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

løkke09_path <- here::here("data", "løkke09.pdf")
løkke09_text <- pdf_text(løkke09_path)
løkke09_df <- data.frame(løkke09_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(løkke09_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 løkke09_tokens <- løkke09_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
løkke09_wc <- løkke09_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
løkke09_wc
## # A tibble: 1,503 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 vi      183
##  2 og      163
##  3 det     149
##  4 i       148
##  5 er      124
##  6 at      121
##  7 en      114
##  8 for      97
##  9 skal     82
## 10 til      81
## # ℹ 1,493 more rows
løkke09_stop <- løkke09_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-løkke09_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
løkke09_swc <- løkke09_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
løkke09_no_numeric <- løkke09_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))
Sentida_neg

løkke09_Sentida <- løkke09_stop %>% 
  inner_join(sentida_lexicon, by = c("word" = "stem"))
løkke09_Sentida
## # A tibble: 530 × 3
##    word        X  score
##    <chr>   <int>  <dbl>
##  1 godt     1636  2.67 
##  2 land     2487  0.167
##  3 rigt     3628  2.33 
##  4 samfund  3724  0.667
##  5 godt     1636  2.67 
##  6 trygt    4545  3    
##  7 samfund  3724  0.667
##  8 tillid   4427  2.33 
##  9 samfund  3724  0.667
## 10 prøv     3455 -0.222
## # ℹ 520 more rows
løkke09_Sentida_hist <- løkke09_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
løkke09_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.634
#mean is 0.634
ggplot(data = løkke09_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

løkke10_path <- here::here("data", "løkke10.pdf")
løkke10_text <- pdf_text(løkke10_path)
løkke10_df <- data.frame(løkke10_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(løkke10_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 løkke10_tokens <- løkke10_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
løkke10_wc <- løkke10_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
løkke10_wc
## # A tibble: 1,344 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 vi      163
##  2 i       148
##  3 det     126
##  4 og      122
##  5 at      113
##  6 er      102
##  7 skal     94
##  8 for      93
##  9 en       92
## 10 til      91
## # ℹ 1,334 more rows
løkke10_stop <- løkke10_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-løkke10_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
løkke10_swc <- løkke10_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
løkke10_no_numeric <- løkke10_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))
Sentida_neg

løkke10_Sentida
## # A tibble: 445 × 3
##    word         X   score
##    <chr>    <int>   <dbl>
##  1 bag        283  0.0833
##  2 kort      2355 -0.556 
##  3 varsel    4986 -2.33  
##  4 drastisk   767  0.333 
##  5 frem      1400  0.667 
##  6 går       1709  0.333 
##  7 fremad    1401  1     
##  8 dansk      662  0.75  
##  9 politik   3361 -0.333 
## 10 ny        3004  1.83  
## # ℹ 435 more rows
løkke10_Sentida_hist <- løkke10_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
løkke10_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.675
#mean is 0.675
ggplot(data = løkke10_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

løkke15_path <- here::here("data", "løkke15.pdf")
løkke15_text <- pdf_text(løkke15_path)
løkke15_df <- data.frame(løkke15_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(løkke15_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 løkke15_tokens <- løkke15_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
løkke15_wc <- løkke15_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
løkke15_wc
## # A tibble: 1,224 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 vi      153
##  2 og      136
##  3 er      135
##  4 det     129
##  5 at      123
##  6 i       117
##  7 for      99
##  8 der      79
##  9 til      78
## 10 på       76
## # ℹ 1,214 more rows
løkke15_stop <- løkke15_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-løkke15_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
løkke15_swc <- løkke15_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
løkke15_no_numeric <- løkke15_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))
Sentida_neg

## # A tibble: 433 × 3
##    word         X score
##    <chr>    <int> <dbl>
##  1 land      2487 0.167
##  2 helt      1749 1.33

  count(score)
løkke15_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))

##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.511
#mean is 0.511

  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

løkke16_path <- here::here("data", "løkke16.pdf")
løkke16_text <- pdf_text(løkke16_path)
løkke16_df <- data.frame(løkke16_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(løkke16_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 løkke16_tokens <- løkke16_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
løkke16_wc <- løkke16_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
løkke16_wc
## # A tibble: 1,339 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 vi      204
##  2 det     180
##  3 i       166
##  4 er      162
##  5 og      157

##  8 en      103

## 10 der      81

løkke16_stop <- løkke16_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-løkke16_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
løkke16_swc <- løkke16_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
løkke16_no_numeric <- løkke16_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))

løkke16_Sentida <- løkke16_stop %>% 
  inner_join(sentida_lexicon, by = c("word" = "stem"))
løkke16_Sentida
## # A tibble: 457 × 3
##    word         X  score
##    <chr>    <int>  <dbl>
##  1 liv       2564  1.53 
##  2 håb       1909  2.33 
##  3 liv       2564  1.53 
##  4 mor       2857  1.33 
##  5 tid       4386  0.333
##  6 telefon   4367  0.333
##  7 radio     3504  0.333
##  8 langtfra  2505 -0.333
##  9 vand      4971  0.167
## 10 luksus    2604  4    
## # ℹ 447 more rows
løkke16_Sentida_hist <- løkke16_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
løkke16_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.613
#mean is 0.613
ggplot(data = løkke16_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

løkke17_path <- here::here("data", "løkke17.pdf")
løkke17_text <- pdf_text(løkke17_path)
løkke17_df <- data.frame(løkke17_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(løkke17_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 løkke17_tokens <- løkke17_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
løkke17_wc <- løkke17_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
løkke17_wc
## # A tibble: 1,388 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 i       168
##  2 og      157
##  3 er      144
##  4 det     136
##  5 vi      124
##  6 at      113
##  7 for      99
##  8 en       88
##  9 til      88
## 10 har      81
## # ℹ 1,378 more rows
løkke17_stop <- løkke17_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-løkke17_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
løkke17_swc <- løkke17_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
løkke17_no_numeric <- løkke17_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))
Sentida_neg

løkke17_Sentida <- løkke17_stop %>% 
  inner_join(sentida_lexicon, by = c("word" = "stem"))
løkke17_Sentida
## # A tibble: 523 × 3
##    word          X  score
##    <chr>     <int>  <dbl>
##  1 gymnasium  1697  0.667
##  2 dag         652  0.167
##  3 besøg       446  0.333
##  4 sal        3715  1    
##  5 røg        3692 -1.33 
##  6 skov       3894  0.667
##  7 drøm        785  2    
##  8 godt       1636  2.67 
##  9 bedst       333  3    
## 10 hjem       1788  0.75 
## # ℹ 513 more rows
løkke17_Sentida_hist <- løkke17_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
løkke17_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.706
#mean is 0.706
ggplot(data = løkke17_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

løkke18_path <- here::here("data", "løkke18.pdf")
løkke18_text <- pdf_text(løkke18_path)
løkke18_df <- data.frame(løkke18_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(løkke18_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 løkke18_tokens <- løkke18_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
løkke18_wc <- løkke18_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
løkke18_wc
## # A tibble: 1,350 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 i       160
##  2 og      124
##  3 vi      119
##  4 det     103
##  5 er       98
##  6 for      93
##  7 til      87
##  8 at       72
##  9 af       69
## 10 de       69
## # ℹ 1,340 more rows
løkke18_stop <- løkke18_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-løkke18_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
løkke18_swc <- løkke18_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
løkke18_no_numeric <- løkke18_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))
Sentida_neg

løkke18_Sentida <- løkke18_stop %>% 
  inner_join(sentida_lexicon, by = c("word" = "stem"))
løkke18_Sentida
## # A tibble: 423 × 3
##    word           X  score
##    <chr>      <int>  <dbl>
##  1 søndag      4318  0.333
##  2 poesi       3351  0.667
##  3 evig         991 -0.167
##  4 tid         4386  0.333
##  5 evig         991 -0.167
##  6 tid         4386  0.333
##  7 ene          918 -0.667
##  8 søn         4317  0.667
##  9 befolkning   338  0.333
## 10 ekstrem      895  0.667
## # ℹ 413 more rows
løkke18_Sentida_hist <- løkke18_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
løkke18_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.660
#mean is 0.660
ggplot(data = løkke18_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

nyrup00_path <- here::here("data", "nyrup00.pdf")
nyrup00_text <- pdf_text(nyrup00_path)
nyrup00_df <- data.frame(nyrup00_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(nyrup00_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 nyrup00_tokens <- nyrup00_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
nyrup00_wc <- nyrup00_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
nyrup00_wc
## # A tibble: 1,532 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 og      207
##  2 i       177
##  3 at      145
##  4 for     124
##  5 er      111
##  6 det     106
##  7 til      95
##  8 af       93
##  9 en       91
## 10 skal     82
## # ℹ 1,522 more rows
nyrup00_stop <- nyrup00_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-nyrup00_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
nyrup00_swc <- nyrup00_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
nyrup00_no_numeric <- nyrup00_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))
Sentida_neg

## # A tibble: 450 × 3
##    word                X  score
##    <chr>           <int>  <dbl>
##  1 nyt              3016  1.11 
##  2 dag               652  0.167
##  3 åbning           5250  0.333
##  4 fremtid          1429  1    
##  5 betydning         461  0.667
##  6 skjul            3890 -0.833
##  7 nej              2970 -2.5  
##  8 valuta           4970  0.333
##  9 regering         3551  0.333
## 10 velfærdssamfund  5016  0.667
## # ℹ 440 more rows
nyrup00_Sentida_hist <- nyrup00_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
nyrup00_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.624
#mean is 0.624
ggplot(data = nyrup00_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

nyrup01_path <- here::here("data", "nyrup01.pdf")
nyrup01_text <- pdf_text(nyrup01_path)
nyrup01_df <- data.frame(nyrup01_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(nyrup01_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 nyrup01_tokens <- nyrup01_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
nyrup01_wc <- nyrup01_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
nyrup01_wc
## # A tibble: 1,704 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 og      258
##  2 i       227
##  3 at      211
##  4 vi      183
##  5 det     174
##  6 er      166
##  7 for     129
##  8 til     115
##  9 en      113
## 10 den     112
## # ℹ 1,694 more rows
nyrup01_stop <- nyrup01_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-nyrup01_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
nyrup01_swc <- nyrup01_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
nyrup01_no_numeric <- nyrup01_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.

nyrup01_Sentida <- nyrup01_stop %>% 
  inner_join(sentida_lexicon, by = c("word" = "stem"))
nyrup01_Sentida
## # A tibble: 545 × 3
##    word          X  score
##    <chr>     <int>  <dbl>
##  1 ny         3004  1.83 
##  2 glimt      1623  0.333
##  3 tirsdag    4463  0.333
##  4 dag         652  0.167
##  5 blot        520 -0.5  
##  6 blot        520 -0.5  
##  7 angreb      183 -2.67 
##  8 angreb      183 -2.67 
##  9 frihed     1439  2.67 
## 10 demokrati   689  0.333
## # ℹ 535 more rows
nyrup01_Sentida_hist <- nyrup01_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
nyrup01_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.363
#mean is 0.363
ggplot(data = nyrup01_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

nyrup93_path <- here::here("data", "nyrup93.pdf")
nyrup93_text <- pdf_text(nyrup93_path)
nyrup93_df <- data.frame(nyrup93_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(nyrup93_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 nyrup93_tokens <- nyrup93_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
nyrup93_wc <- nyrup93_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
nyrup93_wc
## # A tibble: 1,485 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 og      167
##  2 i       159
##  3 det     118
##  4 er      117
##  5 en      112
##  6 for     110
##  7 at      106
##  8 vi      105
##  9 de       88
## 10 til      79
## # ℹ 1,475 more rows
nyrup93_stop <- nyrup93_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-nyrup93_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
nyrup93_swc <- nyrup93_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
nyrup93_no_numeric <- nyrup93_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))
Sentida_neg

nyrup93_Sentida <- nyrup93_stop %>% 
  inner_join(sentida_lexicon, by = c("word" = "stem"))
nyrup93_Sentida
## # A tibble: 413 × 3
##    word          X  score
##    <chr>     <int>  <dbl>
##  1 forny      1278  0.778
##  2 vækst      5149  1.83 
##  3 netværk    2976  0.667
##  4 godt       1636  2.67 
##  5 miljø      2765 -0.333
##  6 rig        3625  1.83 
##  7 kultur     2415  1    
##  8 aktiv       116  1.33 
##  9 samfund    3724  0.667
## 10 demokrati   689  0.333
## # ℹ 403 more rows
nyrup93_Sentida_hist <- nyrup93_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
nyrup93_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.537
#mean is 0.537
ggplot(data = nyrup93_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

nyrup94_path <- here::here("data", "nyrup94.pdf")
nyrup94_text <- pdf_text(nyrup94_path)
nyrup94_df <- data.frame(nyrup94_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(nyrup94_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 nyrup94_tokens <- nyrup94_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
nyrup94_wc <- nyrup94_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
nyrup94_wc
## # A tibble: 1,239 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 og      143
##  2 i       141
##  3 for     118
##  4 at      106
##  5 det      81
##  6 vil      81
##  7 vi       75
##  8 af       68
##  9 til      66
## 10 de       64
## # ℹ 1,229 more rows
nyrup94_stop <- nyrup94_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-nyrup94_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
nyrup94_swc <- nyrup94_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
nyrup94_no_numeric <- nyrup94_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))
Sentida_neg

nyrup94_Sentida <- nyrup94_stop %>% 
  inner_join(sentida_lexicon, by = c("word" = "stem"))
nyrup94_Sentida
## # A tibble: 323 × 3
##    word          X  score
##    <chr>     <int>  <dbl>
##  1 fremtid    1429  1    
##  2 politik    3361 -0.333
##  3 mål        2913  0.5  
##  4 samfund    3724  0.667
##  5 samfund    3724  0.667
##  6 samfund    3724  0.667
##  7 ansvar      208  1.67 
##  8 dag         652  0.167
##  9 udvikling  4749  2.33 
## 10 samfund    3724  0.667
## # ℹ 313 more rows
nyrup94_Sentida_hist <- nyrup94_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
nyrup94_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.546
#mean is 0.546
ggplot(data = nyrup94_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

nyrup95_path <- here::here("data", "nyrup95.pdf")
nyrup95_text <- pdf_text(nyrup95_path)
nyrup95_df <- data.frame(nyrup95_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(nyrup95_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 nyrup95_tokens <- nyrup95_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
nyrup95_wc <- nyrup95_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
nyrup95_wc
## # A tibble: 1,224 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 og      141
##  2 i       114
##  3 for     113
##  4 at       90
##  5 en       75
##  6 er       75
##  7 det      69
##  8 skal     69
##  9 der      65
## 10 de       63
## # ℹ 1,214 more rows
nyrup95_stop <- nyrup95_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-nyrup95_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
nyrup95_swc <- nyrup95_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
nyrup95_no_numeric <- nyrup95_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))
Sentida_neg

nyrup95_Sentida
## # A tibble: 315 × 3
##    word          X   score
##    <chr>     <int>   <dbl>
##  1 gav        1545  2.67  
##  2 ny         3004  1.83  
##  3 start      4126  1.17  
##  4 fremgang   1406  1.67  
##  5 kun        2421 -0.667 
##  6 udvikling  4749  2.33  
##  7 mål        2913  0.5   
##  8 lang       2501 -0.0833
##  9 fremgang   1406  1.67  
## 10 velfærd    5015  2.33  
## # ℹ 305 more rows
nyrup95_Sentida_hist <- nyrup95_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
nyrup95_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.548
#mean is 0.548
ggplot(data = nyrup95_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

nyrup96_path <- here::here("data", "nyrup96.pdf")
nyrup96_text <- pdf_text(nyrup96_path)
nyrup96_df <- data.frame(nyrup96_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(nyrup96_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 nyrup96_tokens <- nyrup96_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
nyrup96_wc <- nyrup96_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
nyrup96_wc
## # A tibble: 1,479 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 og      203
##  2 i       160
##  3 det     122
##  4 er      120
##  5 at      111
##  6 for     109
##  7 til     100
##  8 vi       99
##  9 en       88
## 10 der      85
## # ℹ 1,469 more rows
nyrup96_stop <- nyrup96_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-nyrup96_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
nyrup96_swc <- nyrup96_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
nyrup96_no_numeric <- nyrup96_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))
Sentida_neg

nyrup96_Sentida <- nyrup96_stop %>% 
  inner_join(sentida_lexicon, by = c("word" = "stem"))
nyrup96_Sentida
## # A tibble: 418 × 3
##    word            X  score
##    <chr>       <int>  <dbl>
##  1 forandring   1154  0.333
##  2 teknologisk  4366  0.333
##  3 revolution   3618  1.17 
##  4 global       1625  0.333
##  5 tid          4386  0.333
##  6 helt         1749  1.33 
##  7 klar         2214  1.22 
##  8 enkelt        936  0.667
##  9 borger        548 -0.667
## 10 land         2487  0.167
## # ℹ 408 more rows
nyrup96_Sentida_hist <- nyrup96_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
nyrup96_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.561
#mean is 0.561
ggplot(data = nyrup96_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

nyrup97_path <- here::here("data", "nyrup97.pdf")
nyrup97_text <- pdf_text(nyrup97_path)
nyrup97_df <- data.frame(nyrup97_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(nyrup97_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 nyrup97_tokens <- nyrup97_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
nyrup97_wc <- nyrup97_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
nyrup97_wc
## # A tibble: 1,729 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 og      239
##  2 i       205
##  3 at      165
##  4 for     153
##  5 vi      149
##  6 er      137
##  7 det     129
##  8 til     105
##  9 en       99
## 10 der      98
## # ℹ 1,719 more rows
nyrup97_stop <- nyrup97_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-nyrup97_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
nyrup97_swc <- nyrup97_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
nyrup97_no_numeric <- nyrup97_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))
Sentida_neg

nyrup97_Sentida <- nyrup97_stop %>% 
  inner_join(sentida_lexicon, by = c("word" = "stem"))
nyrup97_Sentida
## # A tibble: 573 × 3
##    word         X  score
##    <chr>    <int>  <dbl>
##  1 flertal   1107  0.667
##  2 ja        2114  2.5  
##  3 folk      1141  0.556
##  4 politisk  3363 -0.333
##  5 tro       4524  0.5  
##  6 forny     1278  0.778
##  7 samfund   3724  0.667
##  8 afsæt       93 -0.333
##  9 fremtid   1429  1    
## 10 bedst      333  3    
## # ℹ 563 more rows
nyrup97_Sentida_hist <- nyrup97_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
nyrup97_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.614
#mean is 0.614
ggplot(data = nyrup97_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

nyrup98_path <- here::here("data", "nyrup98.pdf")
nyrup98_text <- pdf_text(nyrup98_path)
nyrup98_df <- data.frame(nyrup98_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(nyrup98_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 nyrup98_tokens <- nyrup98_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
nyrup98_wc <- nyrup98_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
nyrup98_wc
## # A tibble: 1,744 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 at      236
##  2 og      235
##  3 i       233
##  4 det     213
##  5 vi      193
##  6 er      191
##  7 for     153
##  8 en      114
##  9 til     113
## 10 den     109
## # ℹ 1,734 more rows
nyrup98_stop <- nyrup98_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-nyrup98_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
nyrup98_swc <- nyrup98_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
nyrup98_no_numeric <- nyrup98_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))
Sentida_neg

nyrup98_Sentida <- nyrup98_stop %>% 
  inner_join(sentida_lexicon, by = c("word" = "stem"))
nyrup98_Sentida
## # A tibble: 587 × 3
##    word           X  score
##    <chr>      <int>  <dbl>
##  1 god         1633  2.33 
##  2 få          1529  1    
##  3 forstand    1312  0.333
##  4 dag          652  0.167
##  5 konsekvent  2329  0.333
##  6 økonomisk   5233  0.333
##  7 politik     3361 -0.333
##  8 samfund     3724  0.667
##  9 tværtimod   4585 -1    
## 10 få          1529  1    
## # ℹ 577 more rows
nyrup98_Sentida_hist <- nyrup98_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
nyrup98_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.581
#mean is 0.581
ggplot(data = nyrup98_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

nyrup99_path <- here::here("data", "nyrup99.pdf")
nyrup99_text <- pdf_text(nyrup99_path)
nyrup99_df <- data.frame(nyrup99_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(nyrup99_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 nyrup99_tokens <- nyrup99_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
nyrup99_wc <- nyrup99_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
nyrup99_wc
## # A tibble: 1,849 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 i       262
##  2 det     218
##  3 og      203
##  4 at      195
##  5 er      190
##  6 vi      188
##  7 for     143
##  8 en      125
##  9 der     112
## 10 de      111
## # ℹ 1,839 more rows
nyrup99_stop <- nyrup99_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-nyrup99_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
nyrup99_swc <- nyrup99_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
nyrup99_no_numeric <- nyrup99_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))
Sentida_neg

nyrup99_Sentida <- nyrup99_stop %>% 
  inner_join(sentida_lexicon, by = c("word" = "stem"))
nyrup99_Sentida
## # A tibble: 621 × 3
##    word        X  score
##    <chr>   <int>  <dbl>
##  1 dag       652  0.167
##  2 først    1524  1.5  
##  3 ny       3004  1.83 
##  4 tid      4386  0.333
##  5 stor     4161  2.5  
##  6 risiko   3635 -3    
##  7 fremtid  1429  1    
##  8 fortsat  1340  0.167
##  9 del       683  0.333
## 10 samfund  3724  0.667
## # ℹ 611 more rows
nyrup99_Sentida_hist <- nyrup99_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
nyrup99_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.326
#mean is 0.326
ggplot(data = nyrup99_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

schluter82_path <- here::here("data", "schluter82.pdf")
schluter82_text <- pdf_text(schluter82_path)
schluter82_df <- data.frame(schluter82_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(schluter82_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 schluter82_tokens <- schluter82_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
schluter82_wc <- schluter82_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
schluter82_wc
## # A tibble: 1,657 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 i       205
##  2 og      199
##  3 at      196
##  4 det     151
##  5 for     129
##  6 er      126
##  7 til     122
##  8 vil     115
##  9 af      113
## 10 vi      110
## # ℹ 1,647 more rows
schluter82_stop <- schluter82_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-schluter82_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
schluter82_swc <- schluter82_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
schluter82_no_numeric <- schluter82_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))
Sentida_neg

schluter82_Sentida <- schluter82_stop %>% 
  inner_join(sentida_lexicon, by = c("word" = "stem"))
schluter82_Sentida
## # A tibble: 526 × 3
##    word            X   score
##    <chr>       <int>   <dbl>
##  1 ny           3004  1.83  
##  2 regering     3551  0.333 
##  3 dag           652  0.167 
##  4 ny           3004  1.83  
##  5 politik      3361 -0.333 
##  6 regering     3551  0.333 
##  7 folketing    1148  0.333 
##  8 fællesskab   1500  1.67  
##  9 naturligvis  2939  0.667 
## 10 lang         2501 -0.0833
## # ℹ 516 more rows
schluter82_Sentida_hist <- schluter82_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
schluter82_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.481
#mean is 0.481
ggplot(data = schluter82_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

schluter83_path <- here::here("data", "schluter83.pdf")
schluter83_text <- pdf_text(schluter83_path)
schluter83_df <- data.frame(schluter83_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(schluter83_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 schluter83_tokens <- schluter83_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
schluter83_wc <- schluter83_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
schluter83_wc
## # A tibble: 1,636 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>

##  2 og      190
##  3 i       186
##  4 af      141

##  6 for     130

##  8 er      108

## 10 på       98

schluter83_stop <- schluter83_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-schluter83_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
schluter83_swc <- schluter83_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
schluter83_no_numeric <- schluter83_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))

schluter83_Sentida <- schluter83_stop %>% 
  inner_join(sentida_lexicon, by = c("word" = "stem"))
schluter83_Sentida
## # A tibble: 463 × 3
##    word        X  score
##    <chr>   <int>  <dbl>
##  1 dansk     662  0.75 
##  2 økonomi  5232  0.667
##  3 dag       652  0.167
##  4 ny       3004  1.83 
##  5 politik  3361 -0.333
##  6 politik  3361 -0.333
##  7 politik  3361 -0.333
##  8 samfund  3724  0.667
##  9 politik  3361 -0.333
## 10 tillid   4427  2.33 
## # ℹ 453 more rows
schluter83_Sentida_hist <- schluter83_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
schluter83_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.692
#mean is 0.692
ggplot(data = schluter83_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

schluter84_path <- here::here("data", "schluter84.pdf")
schluter84_text <- pdf_text(schluter84_path)
schluter84_df <- data.frame(schluter84_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(schluter84_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 schluter84_tokens <- schluter84_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
schluter84_wc <- schluter84_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
schluter84_wc
## # A tibble: 1,487 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 i       223
##  2 at      188
##  3 og      167
##  4 det     135
##  5 vi      125
##  6 er      113
##  7 en      111
##  8 de      107
##  9 af      102
## 10 den      98
## # ℹ 1,477 more rows
schluter84_stop <- schluter84_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-schluter84_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
schluter84_swc <- schluter84_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
schluter84_no_numeric <- schluter84_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))
Sentida_neg

schluter84_Sentida <- schluter84_stop %>% 
  inner_join(sentida_lexicon, by = c("word" = "stem"))
schluter84_Sentida
## # A tibble: 470 × 3
##    word          X  score
##    <chr>     <int>  <dbl>
##  1 stærk      4209  2.25 
##  2 drejning    768  0.333
##  3 positiv    3373  4.67 
##  4 opsving    3168  2.33 
##  5 udvikling  4749  2.33 
##  6 velstand   5043  2.67 
##  7 velfærd    5015  2.33 
##  8 politik    3361 -0.333
##  9 land       2487  0.167
## 10 politik    3361 -0.333
## # ℹ 460 more rows
schluter84_Sentida_hist <- schluter84_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
schluter84_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.525
#mean of 0.525
ggplot(data = schluter84_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

schluter85_path <- here::here("data", "schluter85.pdf")
schluter85_text <- pdf_text(schluter85_path)
schluter85_df <- data.frame(schluter85_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(schluter85_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 schluter85_tokens <- schluter85_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
schluter85_wc <- schluter85_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
schluter85_wc
## # A tibble: 1,377 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 at      197
##  2 i       192
##  3 og      170
##  4 vi      162
##  5 det     149
##  6 for     134
##  7 er      112
##  8 af       92
##  9 den      92
## 10 til      92
## # ℹ 1,367 more rows
schluter85_stop <- schluter85_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-schluter85_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
schluter85_swc <- schluter85_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
schluter85_no_numeric <- schluter85_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))
Sentida_neg

## 388 5240             øretæv    -3
schluter85_Sentida <- schluter85_stop %>% 
  inner_join(sentida_lexicon, by = c("word" = "stem"))
schluter85_Sentida
## # A tibble: 455 × 3
##    word           X  score
##    <chr>      <int>  <dbl>
##  1 mål         2913  0.5  
##  2 uro         4886 -2.33 
##  3 mening      2735  0.333
##  4 folk        1141  0.556
##  5 gavn        1547  2.56 
##  6 dag          652  0.167
##  7 uro         4886 -2.33 
##  8 slet        3970 -1.5  
##  9 høj         1894  1.17 
## 10 arbejdsløs   232 -2.17 
## # ℹ 445 more rows
schluter85_Sentida_hist <- schluter85_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
schluter85_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.501
#mean of 0.501
ggplot(data = schluter85_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

schluter86_path <- here::here("data", "schluter86.pdf")
schluter86_text <- pdf_text(schluter86_path)
schluter86_df <- data.frame(schluter86_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(schluter86_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 schluter86_tokens <- schluter86_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
schluter86_wc <- schluter86_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
schluter86_wc
## # A tibble: 1,464 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 og      179
##  2 i       158
##  3 at      139
##  4 det     116
##  5 for     115
##  6 en      111
##  7 vi      104
##  8 af       99
##  9 er       91
## 10 til      85
## # ℹ 1,454 more rows
schluter86_stop <- schluter86_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-schluter86_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
schluter86_swc <- schluter86_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
schluter86_no_numeric <- schluter86_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))
Sentida_neg

schluter86_Sentida
## # A tibble: 392 × 3
##    word          X  score
##    <chr>     <int>  <dbl>
##  1 økonomisk  5233  0.333
##  2 politik    3361 -0.333
##  3 politik    3361 -0.333
##  4 positiv    3373  4.67 
##  5 udvikling  4749  2.33 
##  6 politik    3361 -0.333
##  7 politik    3361 -0.333

##  9 fremgang   1406  1.67 
## 10 udvikling  4749  2.33 
## # ℹ 382 more rows
schluter86_Sentida_hist <- schluter86_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
schluter86_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.541
#mean of 0.541
ggplot(data = schluter86_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

schluter87_path <- here::here("data", "schluter87.pdf")
schluter87_text <- pdf_text(schluter87_path)
schluter87_df <- data.frame(schluter87_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(schluter87_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 schluter87_tokens <- schluter87_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
schluter87_wc <- schluter87_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
schluter87_wc

  select(-schluter87_text)

schluter87_swc <- schluter87_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)

  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))

schluter87_Sentida <- schluter87_stop %>% 
  inner_join(sentida_lexicon, by = c("word" = "stem"))
schluter87_Sentida
## # A tibble: 367 × 3
##    word            X  score
##    <chr>       <int>  <dbl>
##  1 gav          1545  2.67 
##  2 kort         2355 -0.556
##  3 ansvar        208  1.67 
##  4 ansvar        208  1.67 
##  5 høj          1894  1.17 
##  6 grad         1640  0.333
##  7 flertal      1107  0.667
##  8 naturligvis  2939  0.667
##  9 udvikling    4749  2.33 
## 10 folketing    1148  0.333
## # ℹ 357 more rows
schluter87_Sentida_hist <- schluter87_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
schluter87_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.690
#mean is 0.690
ggplot(data = schluter87_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

schluter88_path <- here::here("data", "schluter88.pdf")
schluter88_text <- pdf_text(schluter88_path)
schluter88_df <- data.frame(schluter88_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(schluter88_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 schluter88_tokens <- schluter88_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
schluter88_wc <- schluter88_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
schluter88_wc
## # A tibble: 1,737 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 og      243
##  2 at      205
##  3 i       202
##  4 for     167
##  5 det     157
##  6 en      136
##  7 er      126
##  8 af      121
##  9 vi      119
## 10 de       96
## # ℹ 1,727 more rows
schluter88_stop <- schluter88_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-schluter88_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
schluter88_swc <- schluter88_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
schluter88_no_numeric <- schluter88_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))
Sentida_neg

schluter88_Sentida <- schluter88_stop %>% 
  inner_join(sentida_lexicon, by = c("word" = "stem"))
schluter88_Sentida
## # A tibble: 553 × 3
##    word          X  score
##    <chr>     <int>  <dbl>
##  1 regering   3551  0.333
##  2 netop      2975  0.333
##  3 ny         3004  1.83 
##  4 regering   3551  0.333
##  5 nå         3047  0.5  
##  6 først      1524  1.5  
##  7 fremmest   1416  1    
##  8 få         1529  1    
##  9 underskud  4837 -3    
## 10 dag         652  0.167
## # ℹ 543 more rows
schluter88_Sentida_hist <- schluter88_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
schluter88_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.537
#mean is 0.537
ggplot(data = schluter88_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

schluter89_path <- here::here("data", "schluter89.pdf")
schluter89_text <- pdf_text(schluter89_path)
schluter89_df <- data.frame(schluter89_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(schluter89_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 schluter89_tokens <- schluter89_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
schluter89_wc <- schluter89_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
schluter89_wc
## # A tibble: 1,171 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 i       146
##  2 at      126
##  3 og      120
##  4 det     105
##  5 en       91
##  6 vi       85
##  7 af       79
##  8 de       79
##  9 er       76
## 10 for      72
## # ℹ 1,161 more rows
schluter89_stop <- schluter89_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-schluter89_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
schluter89_swc <- schluter89_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
schluter89_no_numeric <- schluter89_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))
Sentida_neg

schluter89_Sentida <- schluter89_stop %>% 
  inner_join(sentida_lexicon, by = c("word" = "stem"))
schluter89_Sentida
## # A tibble: 329 × 3
##    word           X  score
##    <chr>      <int>  <dbl>
##  1 frem        1400  0.667
##  2 kun         2421 -0.667
##  3 målsætning  2917  0.667
##  4 politisk    3363 -0.333
##  5 sammenhold  3730  1.83 
##  6 aggression   104 -2.67 
##  7 vest        5076  0.111
##  8 målsætning  2917  0.667
##  9 netop       2975  0.333
## 10 frugt       1460  1    
## # ℹ 319 more rows
schluter89_Sentida_hist <- schluter89_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
schluter89_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.714
#mean is 0.714
ggplot(data = schluter89_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

schluter90_path <- here::here("data", "schluter90.pdf")
schluter90_text <- pdf_text(schluter90_path)
schluter90_df <- data.frame(schluter90_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(schluter90_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 schluter90_tokens <- schluter90_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
schluter90_wc <- schluter90_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
schluter90_wc
## # A tibble: 1,438 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 i       175
##  2 og      154
##  3 at      148
##  4 det     121
##  5 for     110
##  6 er      100
##  7 af       93
##  8 vi       88
##  9 en       77
## 10 til      75
## # ℹ 1,428 more rows
schluter90_stop <- schluter90_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-schluter90_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
schluter90_swc <- schluter90_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
schluter90_no_numeric <- schluter90_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))
Sentida_neg

schluter90_Sentida
## # A tibble: 389 × 3
##    word          X  score
##    <chr>     <int>  <dbl>
##  1 helt       1749  1.33 
##  2 dag         652  0.167
##  3 betydning   461  0.667
##  4 økonomisk  5233  0.333
##  5 union      4859  0.333
##  6 holdning   1819 -0.333
##  7 positivt   3374  3    
##  8 høj        1894  1.17 
##  9 grad       1640  0.333
## 10 medansvar  2707  1    
## # ℹ 379 more rows
schluter90_Sentida_hist <- schluter90_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
schluter90_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.687
#mean is 0.687
ggplot(data = schluter90_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

schluter91_path <- here::here("data", "schluter91.pdf")
schluter91_text <- pdf_text(schluter91_path)
schluter91_df <- data.frame(schluter91_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(schluter91_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 schluter91_tokens <- schluter91_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
schluter91_wc <- schluter91_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
schluter91_wc

##    word      n

schluter91_stop <- schluter91_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-schluter91_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
schluter91_swc <- schluter91_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
schluter91_no_numeric <- schluter91_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.

## ! NAs introduced by coercion

  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))

schluter91_Sentida <- schluter91_stop %>% 
  inner_join(sentida_lexicon, by = c("word" = "stem"))
schluter91_Sentida
## # A tibble: 390 × 3
##    word            X  score
##    <chr>       <int>  <dbl>
##  1 dag           652  0.167
##  2 naturligvis  2939  0.667
##  3 godt         1636  2.67 
##  4 godt         1636  2.67 
##  5 brugt         577 -0.667
##  6 positiv      3373  4.67 
##  7 positiv      3373  4.67 
##  8 naturligvis  2939  0.667
##  9 folkeparti   1145  0.333
## 10 dansk         662  0.75 
## # ℹ 380 more rows
schluter91_Sentida_hist <- schluter91_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
schluter91_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.641
#mean is 0.641
ggplot(data = schluter91_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

schluter92_path <- here::here("data", "schluter92.pdf")
schluter92_text <- pdf_text(schluter92_path)
schluter92_df <- data.frame(schluter92_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(schluter92_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 schluter92_tokens <- schluter92_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
schluter92_wc <- schluter92_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
schluter92_wc
## # A tibble: 1,474 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 at      186
##  2 i       162
##  3 og      157
##  4 det     156
##  5 er      128
##  6 vi      118
##  7 af       97
##  8 for      96
##  9 de       89
## 10 en       84
## # ℹ 1,464 more rows
schluter92_stop <- schluter92_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-schluter92_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
schluter92_swc <- schluter92_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
schluter92_no_numeric <- schluter92_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))
Sentida_neg

schluter92_Sentida <- schluter92_stop %>% 
  inner_join(sentida_lexicon, by = c("word" = "stem"))
schluter92_Sentida
## # A tibble: 424 × 3
##    word          X  score
##    <chr>     <int>  <dbl>
##  1 opløsning  3142 -0.667
##  2 krig       2374 -1.83 
##  3 uro        4886 -2.33 
##  4 samfund    3724  0.667
##  5 uset       4892 -0.333
##  6 grad       1640  0.333
##  7 fred       1390  2    
##  8 velstand   5043  2.67 
##  9 ansvar      208  1.67 
## 10 alvor       150 -2.33 
## # ℹ 414 more rows
schluter92_Sentida_hist <- schluter92_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
schluter92_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.575
#mean is 0.575
ggplot(data = schluter92_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

mygdal27_path <- here::here("data", "mygdal27.pdf")
mygdal27_text <- pdf_text(mygdal27_path)
mygdal27_df <- data.frame(mygdal27_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(mygdal27_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 mygdal27_tokens <- mygdal27_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
mygdal27_wc <- mygdal27_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
mygdal27_wc
## # A tibble: 710 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 i        60
##  2 af       58
##  3 og       52
##  4 at       48
##  5 til      45
##  6 den      34
##  7 for      33
##  8 vil      30
##  9 en       26
## 10 som      23
## # ℹ 700 more rows
mygdal27_stop <- mygdal27_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-mygdal27_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
mygdal27_swc <- mygdal27_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
mygdal27_no_numeric <- mygdal27_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))
Sentida_neg

mygdal27_Sentida
## # A tibble: 129 × 3
##    word          X  score
##    <chr>     <int>  <dbl>
##  1 majestæt   2665  0.667
##  2 dag         652  0.167
##  3 majestæt   2665  0.667
##  4 dag         652  0.167
##  5 godt       1636  2.67 
##  6 udvikling  4749  2.33 
##  7 omfang     3072 -0.333
##  8 system     4297  0.333
##  9 mest       2745  0.667
## 10 forening   1200  0.333
## # ℹ 119 more rows
mygdal27_Sentida_hist <- mygdal27_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
mygdal27_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.635
#mean is 0.635
ggplot(data = mygdal27_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

mygdal28_path <- here::here("data", "mygdal28.pdf")
mygdal28_text <- pdf_text(mygdal28_path)
mygdal28_df <- data.frame(mygdal28_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(mygdal28_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 mygdal28_tokens <- mygdal28_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
mygdal28_wc <- mygdal28_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
mygdal28_wc
## # A tibble: 695 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 i        66
##  2 af       57
##  3 at       53
##  4 og       50
##  5 til      40
##  6 for      39
##  7 det      38
##  8 der      35
##  9 de       34
## 10 vil      34
## # ℹ 685 more rows
mygdal28_stop <- mygdal28_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-mygdal28_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
mygdal28_swc <- mygdal28_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
mygdal28_no_numeric <- mygdal28_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))
Sentida_neg

## # A tibble: 152 × 3
##    word           X score
##    <chr>      <int> <dbl>
##  1 majestæt    2665 0.667
##  2 dag          652 0.167
##  3 majestæt    2665 0.667
##  4 dag          652 0.167
##  5 opfordring  3120 0.333
##  6 ære         5216 2.67 
##  7 godt        1636 2.67

##  9 traktat     4504 0.333
## 10 fremtid     1429 1

mygdal28_Sentida_hist <- mygdal28_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
mygdal28_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.577
#mean is 0.577
ggplot(data = mygdal28_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

stauning25_path <- here::here("data", "stauning25.pdf")
stauning25_text <- pdf_text(stauning25_path)
stauning25_df <- data.frame(stauning25_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(stauning25_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 stauning25_tokens <- stauning25_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
stauning25_wc <- stauning25_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
stauning25_wc
## # A tibble: 475 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 og       44
##  2 at       30
##  3 om       28
##  4 af       27
##  5 for      25
##  6 i        25
##  7 vil      21
##  8 den      18
##  9 til      17
## 10 det      16
## # ℹ 465 more rows
stauning25_stop <- stauning25_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-stauning25_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
stauning25_swc <- stauning25_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
stauning25_no_numeric <- stauning25_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))
Sentida_neg
