stauning25_Sentida <- stauning25_stop %>% 
  inner_join(sentida_lexicon, by = c("word" = "stem"))
stauning25_Sentida
## # A tibble: 69 × 3
##    word          X score
##    <chr>     <int> <dbl>
##  1 grundlov   1664 0.333
##  2 majestæt   2665 0.667
##  3 dag         652 0.167
##  4 majestæt   2665 0.667
##  5 tirsdag    4463 0.333
##  6 altid       148 1.67 
##  7 stor       4161 2.5  
##  8 betydning   461 0.667
##  9 grund      1662 0.667
## 10 grundlag   1663 0.167
## # ℹ 59 more rows
stauning25_Sentida_hist <- stauning25_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
stauning25_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.891
#mean is 0.891
ggplot(data = stauning25_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

stauning26_path <- here::here("data", "stauning26.pdf")
stauning26_text <- pdf_text(stauning26_path)
stauning26_df <- data.frame(stauning26_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(stauning26_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 stauning26_tokens <- stauning26_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
stauning26_wc <- stauning26_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
stauning26_wc
## # A tibble: 577 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 og       44
##  2 i        37
##  3 af       35
##  4 at       31
##  5 er       31
##  6 for      29
##  7 til      24
##  8 om       23
##  9 en       22
## 10 vil      21
## # ℹ 567 more rows
stauning26_stop <- stauning26_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-stauning26_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
stauning26_swc <- stauning26_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
stauning26_no_numeric <- stauning26_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))
Sentida_neg

stauning26_Sentida <- stauning26_stop %>% 
  inner_join(sentida_lexicon, by = c("word" = "stem"))
stauning26_Sentida
## # A tibble: 77 × 3
##    word         X  score
##    <chr>    <int>  <dbl>
##  1 grundlov  1664  0.333
##  2 majestæt  2665  0.667
##  3 henhold   1753 -0.333
##  4 dag        652  0.167
##  5 majestæt  2665  0.667
##  6 tirsdag   4463  0.333
##  7 tid       4386  0.333
##  8 sidst     3819 -1    
##  9 fortsat   1340  0.167
## 10 snart     4019  0.333
## # ℹ 67 more rows
stauning26_Sentida_hist <- stauning26_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
stauning26_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.637
#mean is 0.637
ggplot(data = stauning26_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

stauning29_path <- here::here("data", "stauning29.pdf")
stauning29_text <- pdf_text(stauning29_path)
stauning29_df <- data.frame(stauning29_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(stauning29_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 stauning29_tokens <- stauning29_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
stauning29_wc <- stauning29_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
stauning29_wc
## # A tibble: 565 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 af       42
##  2 og       42
##  3 at       37
##  4 i        36
##  5 til      28
##  6 det      23
##  7 vil      23
##  8 for      22
##  9 en       21
## 10 om       21
## # ℹ 555 more rows
stauning29_stop <- stauning29_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-stauning29_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
stauning29_swc <- stauning29_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
stauning29_no_numeric <- stauning29_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))
Sentida_neg

stauning29_Sentida
## # A tibble: 95 × 3
##    word            X  score
##    <chr>       <int>  <dbl>
##  1 grundlov     1664  0.333
##  2 majestæt     2665  0.667
##  3 henhold      1753 -0.333
##  4 dag           652  0.167
##  5 majestæt     2665  0.667
##  6 tirsdag      4463  0.333
##  7 tid          4386  0.333
##  8 ministerium  2787  0.333
##  9 politik      3361 -0.333
## 10 fortsat      1340  0.167
## # ℹ 85 more rows
stauning29_Sentida_hist <- stauning29_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
stauning29_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.660
#mean is 0.660
ggplot(data = stauning29_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

stauning30_path <- here::here("data", "stauning30.pdf")
stauning30_text <- pdf_text(stauning30_path)
stauning30_df <- data.frame(stauning30_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(stauning30_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 stauning30_tokens <- stauning30_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
stauning30_wc <- stauning30_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
stauning30_wc
## # A tibble: 613 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 af       45
##  2 i        45
##  3 og       45
##  4 om       41
##  5 at       38
##  6 vil      28
##  7 den      27
##  8 til      27
##  9 det      25
## 10 de       20
## # ℹ 603 more rows
stauning30_stop <- stauning30_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-stauning30_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
stauning30_swc <- stauning30_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
stauning30_no_numeric <- stauning30_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))
Sentida_neg

## # A tibble: 100 × 3
##    word         X  score
##    <chr>    <int>  <dbl>
##  1 grundlov  1664  0.333
##  2 majestæt  2665  0.667
##  3 henhold   1753 -0.333
##  4 dag        652  0.167
##  5 majestæt  2665  0.667

stauning30_Sentida_hist <- stauning30_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
stauning30_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.407
#mean is 0.407
ggplot(data = stauning30_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

stauning31_path <- here::here("data", "stauning31.pdf")
stauning31_text <- pdf_text(stauning31_path)
stauning31_df <- data.frame(stauning31_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(stauning31_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 stauning31_tokens <- stauning31_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
stauning31_wc <- stauning31_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
stauning31_wc
## # A tibble: 595 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 i        48
##  2 og       48
##  3 at       34
##  4 af       28
##  5 der      27
##  6 om       26
##  7 til      25
##  8 for      24
##  9 det      23
## 10 den      22
## # ℹ 585 more rows
stauning31_stop <- stauning31_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-stauning31_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
stauning31_swc <- stauning31_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
stauning31_no_numeric <- stauning31_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))
Sentida_neg

stauning31_Sentida <- stauning31_stop %>% 
  inner_join(sentida_lexicon, by = c("word" = "stem"))
stauning31_Sentida
## # A tibble: 94 × 3
##    word         X  score
##    <chr>    <int>  <dbl>
##  1 grundlov  1664  0.333
##  2 majestæt  2665  0.667
##  3 henhold   1753 -0.333
##  4 dag        652  0.167
##  5 majestæt  2665  0.667
##  6 ude       4664 -1    
##  7 land      2487  0.167
##  8 grad      1640  0.333
##  9 del        683  0.333
## 10 landbrug  2488  0.333
## # ℹ 84 more rows
stauning31_Sentida_hist <- stauning31_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
stauning31_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.402
#mean is 0.402
ggplot(data = stauning31_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

stauning32_path <- here::here("data", "stauning32.pdf")
stauning32_text <- pdf_text(stauning32_path)
stauning32_df <- data.frame(stauning32_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(stauning32_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 stauning32_tokens <- stauning32_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
stauning32_wc <- stauning32_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
stauning32_wc
## # A tibble: 620 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 af       56
##  2 og       54
##  3 i        46
##  4 om       43
##  5 til      38
##  6 at       28
##  7 den      25
##  8 der      25
##  9 for      24
## 10 de       23
## # ℹ 610 more rows
stauning32_stop <- stauning32_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-stauning32_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
stauning32_swc <- stauning32_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
stauning32_no_numeric <- stauning32_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))
Sentida_neg

stauning32_Sentida <- stauning32_stop %>% 
  inner_join(sentida_lexicon, by = c("word" = "stem"))
stauning32_Sentida
## # A tibble: 113 × 3
##    word            X  score
##    <chr>       <int>  <dbl>
##  1 grundlov     1664  0.333
##  2 majestæt     2665  0.667
##  3 henhold      1753 -0.333
##  4 dag           652  0.167
##  5 majestæt     2665  0.667
##  6 dag           652  0.167
##  7 land         2487  0.167
##  8 landbrug     2488  0.333
##  9 fald         1008 -1    
## 10 naturligvis  2939  0.667
## # ℹ 103 more rows
stauning32_Sentida_hist <- stauning32_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
stauning32_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.411
#mean is 0.411
ggplot(data = stauning32_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

stauning33_path <- here::here("data", "stauning33.pdf")
stauning33_text <- pdf_text(stauning33_path)
stauning33_df <- data.frame(stauning33_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(stauning33_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 stauning33_tokens <- stauning33_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
stauning33_wc <- stauning33_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
stauning33_wc
## # A tibble: 473 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 i        36
##  2 og       31
##  3 den      26
##  4 er       24
##  5 at       23
##  6 til      21
##  7 af       20
##  8 for      20
##  9 det      18
## 10 som      16
## # ℹ 463 more rows
stauning33_stop <- stauning33_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-stauning33_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
stauning33_swc <- stauning33_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
stauning33_no_numeric <- stauning33_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))
Sentida_neg

  inner_join(sentida_lexicon, by = c("word" = "stem"))
stauning33_Sentida
## # A tibble: 79 × 3
##    word              X  score
##    <chr>         <int>  <dbl>
##  1 grundlov       1664  0.333
##  2 majestæt       2665  0.667
##  3 henhold        1753 -0.333
##  4 dag             652  0.167
##  5 majestæt       2665  0.667
##  6 dag             652  0.167
##  7 international  2072  0.667
##  8 ordning        3190  0.333
##  9 resultat       3607  1.67 
## 10 fortsat        1340  0.167
## # ℹ 69 more rows
stauning33_Sentida_hist <- stauning33_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
stauning33_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.734
#mean is 0.734
ggplot(data = stauning33_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

stauning34_path <- here::here("data", "stauning34.pdf")
stauning34_text <- pdf_text(stauning34_path)
stauning34_df <- data.frame(stauning34_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(stauning34_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 stauning34_tokens <- stauning34_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
stauning34_wc <- stauning34_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
stauning34_wc
## # A tibble: 593 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 og       49
##  2 i        43
##  3 at       41
##  4 for      34
##  5 til      33
##  6 af       32
##  7 er       32
##  8 det      30
##  9 der      25
## 10 de       19
## # ℹ 583 more rows
stauning34_stop <- stauning34_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-stauning34_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
stauning34_swc <- stauning34_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
stauning34_no_numeric <- stauning34_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))
Sentida_neg

stauning34_Sentida
## # A tibble: 85 × 3
##    word         X  score
##    <chr>    <int>  <dbl>
##  1 grundlov  1664  0.333
##  2 majestæt  2665  0.667
##  3 henhold   1753 -0.333
##  4 dag        652  0.167
##  5 majestæt  2665  0.667
##  6 dag        652  0.167
##  7 del        683  0.333
##  8 bedring    331  2.67 
##  9 ude       4664 -1    
## 10 bedring    331  2.67 
## # ℹ 75 more rows
stauning34_Sentida_hist <- stauning34_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
stauning34_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.441
#mean is 0.441
ggplot(data = stauning34_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

anker73_path <- here::here("data", "anker73.pdf")
anker73_text <- pdf_text(anker73_path)
anker73_df <- data.frame(anker73_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(anker73_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 anker73_tokens <- anker73_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
anker73_wc <- anker73_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
anker73_wc
## # A tibble: 1,551 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 i       187
##  2 og      147
##  3 af      135
##  4 at      119
##  5 en      119
##  6 det     101
##  7 for     100
##  8 er       87
##  9 den      80
## 10 til      73
## # ℹ 1,541 more rows
anker73_stop <- anker73_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-anker73_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
anker73_swc <- anker73_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
anker73_no_numeric <- anker73_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))

anker73_Sentida <- anker73_stop %>% 
  inner_join(sentida_lexicon, by = c("word" = "stem"))
anker73_Sentida
## # A tibble: 418 × 3
##    word              X score
##    <chr>         <int> <dbl>
##  1 international  2072 0.667
##  2 høj            1894 1.17 
##  3 høj            1894 1.17 
##  4 social         4033 1.67 
##  5 kulturel       2417 1    
##  6 standard       4124 0.333
##  7 samfund        3724 0.667
##  8 først          1524 1.5  
##  9 fremmest       1416 1    
## 10 vis            5114 0.722
## # ℹ 408 more rows
anker73_Sentida_hist <- anker73_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
anker73_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.510
#mean is 0.510
ggplot(data = anker73_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

anker75_path <- here::here("data", "anker75.pdf")
anker75_text <- pdf_text(anker75_path)
anker75_df <- data.frame(anker75_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(anker75_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 anker75_tokens <- anker75_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
anker75_wc <- anker75_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
anker75_wc
## # A tibble: 1,381 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 i       163
##  2 at      139
##  3 af      112
##  4 for     107
##  5 og      106
##  6 en      103
##  7 det      97
##  8 er       79
##  9 til      76
## 10 den      74
## # ℹ 1,371 more rows
anker75_stop <- anker75_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-anker75_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
anker75_swc <- anker75_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
anker75_no_numeric <- anker75_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))
Sentida_neg

anker75_Sentida <- anker75_stop %>% 
  inner_join(sentida_lexicon, by = c("word" = "stem"))
anker75_Sentida
## # A tibble: 331 × 3
##    word           X   score
##    <chr>      <int>   <dbl>
##  1 økonomisk   5233  0.333 
##  2 bag          283  0.0833
##  3 politik     3361 -0.333 
##  4 fællesskab  1500  1.67  
##  5 håb         1909  2.33  
##  6 flertal     1107  0.667 
##  7 fortsat     1340  0.167 
##  8 frem        1400  0.667 
##  9 lang        2501 -0.0833
## 10 tradition   4495  0.333 
## # ℹ 321 more rows
anker75_Sentida_hist <- anker75_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
anker75_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.629
#mean is 0.629
ggplot(data = anker75_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

anker76_path <- here::here("data", "anker76.pdf")
anker76_text <- pdf_text(anker76_path)
anker76_df <- data.frame(anker76_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(anker76_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 anker76_tokens <- anker76_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
anker76_wc <- anker76_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
anker76_wc
## # A tibble: 1,326 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 i       145
##  2 at      133
##  3 og      126
##  4 det     100
##  5 en       92
##  6 er       88
##  7 på       86
##  8 af       85
##  9 for      82
## 10 til      81
## # ℹ 1,316 more rows
anker76_stop <- anker76_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-anker76_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
anker76_swc <- anker76_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
anker76_no_numeric <- anker76_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))
Sentida_neg

anker76_Sentida <- anker76_stop %>% 
  inner_join(sentida_lexicon, by = c("word" = "stem"))
anker76_Sentida
## # A tibble: 337 × 3
##    word           X  score
##    <chr>      <int>  <dbl>
##  1 folketing   1148  0.333
##  2 mest        2745  0.667
##  3 generation  1556  0.333
##  4 sammenhæng  3731  0.667
##  5 få          1529  1    
##  6 gennemført  1574  3    
##  7 mest        2745  0.667
##  8 økonomisk   5233  0.333
##  9 fortsat     1340  0.167
## 10 politik     3361 -0.333
## # ℹ 327 more rows
anker76_Sentida_hist <- anker76_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
anker76_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.576
#mean is 0.576
ggplot(data = anker76_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

anker77_path <- here::here("data", "anker77.pdf")
anker77_text <- pdf_text(anker77_path)
anker77_df <- data.frame(anker77_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(anker77_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 anker77_tokens <- anker77_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
anker77_wc <- anker77_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
anker77_wc
## # A tibble: 1,464 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 i       148
##  2 og      144
##  3 at      134
##  4 af      128
##  5 en      116
##  6 for     101
##  7 det     100
##  8 til      80
##  9 på       78
## 10 der      76
## # ℹ 1,454 more rows
anker77_stop <- anker77_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-anker77_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
anker77_swc <- anker77_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
anker77_no_numeric <- anker77_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))
Sentida_neg

  inner_join(sentida_lexicon, by = c("word" = "stem"))
anker77_Sentida
## # A tibble: 334 × 3
##    word           X  score
##    <chr>      <int>  <dbl>
##  1 dag          652  0.167
##  2 høj         1894  1.17 
##  3 grad        1640  0.333
##  4 folkeparti  1145  0.333
##  5 stramning   4181 -2    
##  6 tid         4386  0.333
##  7 perspektiv  3319  0.333
##  8 løsning     2650  2.33 
##  9 fortsat     1340  0.167
## 10 grund       1662  0.667
## # ℹ 324 more rows
anker77_Sentida_hist <- anker77_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
anker77_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.579
#mean is 0.579
ggplot(data = anker77_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

anker78_path <- here::here("data", "anker78.pdf")
anker78_text <- pdf_text(anker78_path)
anker78_df <- data.frame(anker78_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(anker78_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 anker78_tokens <- anker78_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
anker78_wc <- anker78_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
anker78_wc
## # A tibble: 1,570 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 i       207
##  2 at      179
##  3 af      152
##  4 og      141
##  5 en      134
##  6 for     121
##  7 vil     104
##  8 den      99
##  9 det      98
## 10 de       96
## # ℹ 1,560 more rows
anker78_stop <- anker78_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-anker78_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
anker78_swc <- anker78_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
anker78_no_numeric <- anker78_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))

anker78_Sentida <- anker78_stop %>% 
  inner_join(sentida_lexicon, by = c("word" = "stem"))
anker78_Sentida
## # A tibble: 417 × 3
##    word           X  score
##    <chr>      <int>  <dbl>
##  1 få          1529  1    
##  2 tid         4386  0.333
##  3 kun         2421 -0.667
##  4 økonomisk   5233  0.333
##  5 politisk    3363 -0.333
##  6 dansk        662  0.75 
##  7 politik     3361 -0.333
##  8 truet       4540 -2.33 
##  9 konsekvent  2329  0.333
## 10 politik     3361 -0.333
## # ℹ 407 more rows
anker78_Sentida_hist <- anker78_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
anker78_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.431
#mean is 0.431
ggplot(data = anker78_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

anker79_path <- here::here("data", "anker79.pdf")
anker79_text <- pdf_text(anker79_path)
anker79_df <- data.frame(anker79_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(anker79_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 anker79_tokens <- anker79_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
anker79_wc <- anker79_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
anker79_wc
## # A tibble: 1,342 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 at      135
##  2 i       134
##  3 af      123
##  4 og      112
##  5 en      109
##  6 for     104
##  7 til      88
##  8 vil      85
##  9 de       84
## 10 der      77
## # ℹ 1,332 more rows
anker79_stop <- anker79_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-anker79_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
anker79_swc <- anker79_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
anker79_no_numeric <- anker79_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))
Sentida_neg

anker79_Sentida <- anker79_stop %>% 
  inner_join(sentida_lexicon, by = c("word" = "stem"))
anker79_Sentida
## # A tibble: 352 × 3
##    word                  X  score
##    <chr>             <int>  <dbl>
##  1 socialdemokratisk  4035  0.333
##  2 løsning            2650  2.33 
##  3 udvikling          4749  2.33 
##  4 stor               4161  2.5  
##  5 betydning           461  0.667
##  6 parlamentarisk     3293  0.333
##  7 grundlag           1663  0.167
##  8 politik            3361 -0.333
##  9 tillid             4427  2.33 
## 10 politik            3361 -0.333
## # ℹ 342 more rows
anker79_Sentida_hist <- anker79_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
anker79_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.551
#mean is 0.551
ggplot(data = anker79_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

anker81_path <- here::here("data", "anker81.pdf")
anker81_text <- pdf_text(anker81_path)
anker81_df <- data.frame(anker81_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(anker81_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 anker81_tokens <- anker81_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
anker81_wc <- anker81_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
anker81_wc
## # A tibble: 1,622 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 i       192
##  2 og      168
##  3 at      150
##  4 af      130
##  5 en      121
##  6 for     111
##  7 der     101
##  8 den      98
##  9 det      96
## 10 vil      95
## # ℹ 1,612 more rows
anker81_stop <- anker81_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-anker81_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
anker81_swc <- anker81_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
anker81_no_numeric <- anker81_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))
Sentida_neg

anker81_Sentida <- anker81_stop %>% 
  inner_join(sentida_lexicon, by = c("word" = "stem"))
anker81_Sentida
## # A tibble: 416 × 3
##    word          X  score
##    <chr>     <int>  <dbl>
##  1 hensyn     1760  0.333
##  2 udvikling  4749  2.33 
##  3 frem       1400  0.667
##  4 udvikling  4749  2.33 
##  5 fortsat    1340  0.167
##  6 få         1529  1    
##  7 slå        3991 -1.67 
##  8 aktiv       116  1.33 
##  9 politik    3361 -0.333
## 10 økonomisk  5233  0.333
## # ℹ 406 more rows
anker81_Sentida_hist <- anker81_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
anker81_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.528
#mean is 0.528
ggplot(data = anker81_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

kragh72_path <- here::here("data", "kragh72.pdf")
kragh72_text <- pdf_text(kragh72_path)
kragh72_df <- data.frame(kragh72_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(kragh72_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 kragh72_tokens <- kragh72_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
kragh72_wc <- kragh72_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
kragh72_wc
## # A tibble: 1,464 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 i       167
##  2 og      165
##  3 at      128
##  4 en      113
##  5 af      110
##  6 for     109
##  7 det     103
##  8 den      89
##  9 de       87
## 10 der      84
## # ℹ 1,454 more rows
kragh72_stop <- kragh72_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-kragh72_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
kragh72_swc <- kragh72_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
kragh72_no_numeric <- kragh72_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))
Sentida_neg

kragh72_Sentida <- kragh72_stop %>% 
  inner_join(sentida_lexicon, by = c("word" = "stem"))
kragh72_Sentida
## # A tibble: 392 × 3
##    word           X  score
##    <chr>      <int>  <dbl>
##  1 majestæt    2665  0.667
##  2 formand     1260  1.33 
##  3 folk        1141  0.556
##  4 går         1709  0.333
##  5 historisk   1784  0.333
##  6 beslutning   428  0.333
##  7 ja          2114  2.5  
##  8 nej         2970 -2.5  
##  9 beslutning   428  0.333
## 10 dansk        662  0.75 
## # ℹ 382 more rows
kragh72_Sentida_hist <- kragh72_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
kragh72_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.599
#mean is 0.599
ggplot(data = kragh72_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

fogh03_path <- here::here("data", "fogh03.pdf")
fogh03_text <- pdf_text(fogh03_path)
fogh03_df <- data.frame(fogh03_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(fogh03_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 fogh03_tokens <- fogh03_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
fogh03_wc <- fogh03_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
fogh03_wc
## # A tibble: 1,293 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 og      182
##  2 at      149
##  3 er      131
##  4 i       128
##  5 vi      125
##  6 det     104
##  7 til     100
##  8 for      91
##  9 en       89
## 10 skal     78
## # ℹ 1,283 more rows
fogh03_stop <- fogh03_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-fogh03_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
fogh03_swc <- fogh03_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
fogh03_no_numeric <- fogh03_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))
Sentida_neg

fogh03_Sentida <- fogh03_stop %>% 
  inner_join(sentida_lexicon, by = c("word" = "stem"))
fogh03_Sentida
## # A tibble: 492 × 3
##    word                X score
##    <chr>           <int> <dbl>
##  1 bedst             333 3    
##  2 samfund          3724 0.667
##  3 foran            1152 0.333
##  4 velfærdssamfund  5016 0.667
##  5 modernisering    2831 0.667
##  6 reform           3547 0.333
##  7 aktiv             116 1.33 
##  8 folk             1141 0.556
##  9 effektivt         836 3    
## 10 stabilt          4120 2    
## # ℹ 482 more rows
fogh03_Sentida_hist <- fogh03_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
fogh03_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.538
#mean is 0.538
ggplot(data = fogh03_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

fogh04_path <- here::here("data", "fogh04.pdf")
fogh04_text <- pdf_text(fogh04_path)
fogh04_df <- data.frame(fogh04_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(fogh04_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 fogh04_tokens <- fogh04_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
fogh04_wc <- fogh04_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
fogh04_wc
## # A tibble: 1,371 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 og      187
##  2 vi      154
##  3 at      139
##  4 er      123
##  5 i       119
##  6 det     108
##  7 for      99
##  8 til      95
##  9 en       80
## 10 vil      73
## # ℹ 1,361 more rows
fogh04_stop <- fogh04_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-fogh04_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
fogh04_swc <- fogh04_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
fogh04_no_numeric <- fogh04_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))
Sentida_neg

fogh04_Sentida <- fogh04_stop %>% 
  inner_join(sentida_lexicon, by = c("word" = "stem"))
fogh04_Sentida
## # A tibble: 428 × 3
##    word           X  score
##    <chr>      <int>  <dbl>
##  1 går         1709  0.333
##  2 godt        1636  2.67 
##  3 solid       4044  1    
##  4 økonomi     5232  0.667
##  5 overskud    3255  2.33 
##  6 gæld        1699 -1.17 
##  7 lav         2514 -0.417
##  8 overskud    3255  2.33 
##  9 gæld        1699 -1.17 
## 10 skattestop  3867 -0.667
## # ℹ 418 more rows
fogh04_Sentida_hist <- fogh04_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
fogh04_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.543
#mean is 0.543
ggplot(data = fogh04_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

fogh05_path <- here::here("data", "fogh05.pdf")
fogh05_text <- pdf_text(fogh05_path)
fogh05_df <- data.frame(fogh05_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(fogh05_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 fogh05_tokens <- fogh05_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
fogh05_wc <- fogh05_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
fogh05_wc
## # A tibble: 1,303 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 og      200
##  2 i       161
##  3 vi      141
##  4 at      137
##  5 det     122
##  6 er      108
##  7 for     101
##  8 til      93
##  9 en       83
## 10 skal     73
## # ℹ 1,293 more rows
fogh05_stop <- fogh05_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-fogh05_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
fogh05_swc <- fogh05_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
fogh05_no_numeric <- fogh05_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))
Sentida_neg

fogh05_Sentida <- fogh05_stop %>% 
  inner_join(sentida_lexicon, by = c("word" = "stem"))
fogh05_Sentida
## # A tibble: 456 × 3
##    word          X  score
##    <chr>     <int>  <dbl>
##  1 vækst      5149  1.83 
##  2 velstand   5043  2.67 
##  3 fremgang   1406  1.67 
##  4 godt       1636  2.67 
##  5 dansk       662  0.75 
##  6 økonomi    5232  0.667
##  7 europæisk   986  0.333
##  8 gæld       1699 -1.17 
##  9 lav        2514 -0.417
## 10 overskud   3255  2.33 
## # ℹ 446 more rows
fogh05_Sentida_hist <- fogh05_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
fogh05_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.549
#mean is 0.549
ggplot(data = fogh05_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

fogh06_path <- here::here("data", "fogh06.pdf")
fogh06_text <- pdf_text(fogh06_path)
fogh06_df <- data.frame(fogh06_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(fogh06_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 fogh06_tokens <- fogh06_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
fogh06_wc <- fogh06_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
fogh06_wc
## # A tibble: 1,305 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 og      201
##  2 at      151
##  3 det     126
##  4 i       125
##  5 er      123
##  6 vi      122
##  7 til      90
##  8 for      79
##  9 de       78
## 10 en       73
## # ℹ 1,295 more rows
fogh06_stop <- fogh06_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-fogh06_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
fogh06_swc <- fogh06_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
fogh06_no_numeric <- fogh06_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))
Sentida_neg

## # A tibble: 508 × 3
##    word                  X  score
##    <chr>             <int>  <dbl>
##  1 fly                1122  0.333
##  2 tusindvis          4574  0.667
##  3 ihjel              1939 -3.67 
##  4 global             1625  0.333
##  5 oplysning          3139  1    
##  6 fundamentalistisk  1483 -2    
##  7 demokrati           689  0.333
##  8 diktatur            725 -3.67 
##  9 frihed             1439  2.67 
## 10 kamp               2158 -1.67 
## # ℹ 498 more rows
fogh06_Sentida_hist <- fogh06_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
fogh06_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.586
#mean is 0.586
ggplot(data = fogh06_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

fogh08_path <- here::here("data", "fogh08.pdf")
fogh08_text <- pdf_text(fogh08_path)
fogh08_df <- data.frame(fogh08_text)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_split(fogh08_text,pattern='\n'))%>%
 unnest(text_full)%>%
 mutate(text_full=str_trim(text_full))
 fogh08_tokens <- fogh08_df %>% 
     unnest_tokens(word, text_full)
fogh08_wc <- fogh08_tokens %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
fogh08_wc
## # A tibble: 1,402 × 2
##    word      n
##    <chr> <int>
##  1 og      219
##  2 vi      176
##  3 i       137
##  4 at      128
##  5 for     120
##  6 er      111
##  7 det      99
##  8 til      86
##  9 vil      84
## 10 en       83
## # ℹ 1,392 more rows
fogh08_stop <- fogh08_tokens %>% 
  anti_join(stop_words) %>% 
  select(-fogh08_text)
## Joining with `by = join_by(word)`
fogh08_swc <- fogh08_stop %>% 
     count(word) %>% 
     arrange(-n)
fogh08_no_numeric <- fogh08_stop %>% 
  filter(is.na(as.numeric(word)))
## Warning: There was 1 warning in `filter()`.
## ℹ In argument: `is.na(as.numeric(word))`.
## Caused by warning:
## ! NAs introduced by coercion
Sentida_pos <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(3,4,5))
Sentida_neg <- sentida_lexicon %>% 
  filter(score %in% c(-3,-4,-5))
Sentida_neg

fogh08_Sentida <- fogh08_stop %>% 
  inner_join(sentida_lexicon, by = c("word" = "stem"))
fogh08_Sentida
## # A tibble: 513 × 3
##    word         X  score
##    <chr>    <int>  <dbl>
##  1 fremgang  1406  1.67 
##  2 lav       2514 -0.417
##  3 godt      1636  2.67 
##  4 trygt     4545  3    
##  5 bo         532  0.167
##  6 truet     4540 -2.33 
##  7 krig      2374 -1.83 
##  8 økonomi   5232  0.667
##  9 terror    4374 -4    
## 10 terror    4374 -4    
## # ℹ 503 more rows
fogh08_Sentida_hist <- fogh08_Sentida %>% 
  count(score)
fogh08_Sentida %>% 
  summarise(mean_sentiment = mean(score))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   mean_sentiment
##            <dbl>
## 1          0.359
#mean is 0.359
ggplot(data = fogh08_Sentida_hist, aes(x = score, y = n)) +
  geom_col(aes(fill = score)) +
  theme_bw()

#Now making graphs out of the mean sentiment value for each economic crisis

# Import data
depressionen <- read.csv2(
  here::here("data", "depressionen.csv")
) %>%
  mutate(mean.sentiment.value = as.numeric(mean.sentiment.value))

# Create graph to plot the mean sentiment value in opening speeches before and during the Great Depression
ggplot(depressionen, aes(x = year, y = mean.sentiment.value)) +
  geom_line(color = "darkred", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(color = "darkred", size = 3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "blue", linewidth = 1) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1925:1934) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, NA)) +
  labs(
    title = "Depressionen",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Mean Sentiment"
  ) +
  theme_bw()
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

# Import data
a70erne00erne <- read.csv2(
  here::here("data", "a70erne00erne.csv")
) %>%
  mutate(mean.sentiment.value = as.numeric(mean.sentiment.value))

# Create graph for the entire period of the 70s, 80s, and 90s since each crisis flows into the next in this period
ggplot(a70erne00erne, aes(x = year, y = mean.sentiment.value)) +
  geom_line(color = "darkred", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(color = "darkred", size = 3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "blue", linewidth = 1) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1968:2001) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, NA)) +
  labs(
    title = "70s Oil Crises, Fattig Firserne and Dotcom Bubble",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Mean Sentiment"
  ) +
  theme_bw()
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

#splitting the three decades into each specific crisis

# First Oil Crisis
oil1 <- a70erne00erne %>%
  filter(year >= 1968 & year <= 1974)

ggplot(oil1, aes(x = year, y = mean.sentiment.value)) +
  geom_line(color = "darkred", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(color = "darkred", size = 3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "blue", linewidth = 1) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1968:1974) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, NA)) +
  labs(
    title = "First Oil Crisis",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Mean Sentiment"
  ) +
  theme_bw()
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

# Second Oil Crisis
oil2 <- a70erne00erne %>%
  filter(year >= 1975 & year <= 1980)

ggplot(oil2, aes(x = year, y = mean.sentiment.value)) +
  geom_line(color = "darkred", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(color = "darkred", size = 3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "blue", linewidth = 1) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1975:1980) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, NA)) +
  labs(
    title = "Second Oil Crisis",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Mean Sentiment"
  ) +
  theme_bw()
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

# Fattig Firserne
fattig80 <- a70erne00erne %>%
  filter(year >= 1981 & year <= 1989)

ggplot(fattig80, aes(x = year, y = mean.sentiment.value)) +
  geom_line(color = "darkred", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(color = "darkred", size = 3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "blue", linewidth = 1) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1981:1989) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, NA)) +
  labs(
    title = "Fattig Firserne",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Mean Sentiment"
  ) +
  theme_bw()
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

# Nyrup Economic Revival
nyrup <- a70erne00erne %>%
  filter(year >= 1990 & year <= 2001)

ggplot(nyrup, aes(x = year, y = mean.sentiment.value)) +
  geom_line(color = "darkred", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(color = "darkred", size = 3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "blue", linewidth = 1, se = FALSE) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1990:2001) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, NA)) +
  labs(
    title = "Nyrup Economic Revival",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Mean Sentiment"
  ) +
  theme_bw()
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

#important to note that it is only by the end of the decade that there is an actual improvement in the economy, meaning Fattig firserne's stagnant economy bled into the 90s

#Now the third financial crisis

# Import data
a2008financialcrisis <- read.csv2(
  here::here("data", "a2008financial.csv")
) %>%
  mutate(mean.sentiment.value = as.numeric(mean.sentiment.value))

# Create graph the 2008 world financial crisis
ggplot(a2008financialcrisis, aes(x = Year, y = mean.sentiment.value)) +
  geom_line(color = "darkred", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(color = "darkred", size = 3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "blue", linewidth = 1) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 2003:2010) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, NA)) +
  labs(
    title = "2008 World Financial Crisis",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Mean Sentiment"
  ) +
  theme_bw()
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

#and the fourth

# Import data
covidfinancial <- read.csv2(
  here::here("data", "covidfinancial.csv")
) %>%
  mutate(mean.sentiment.value = as.numeric(mean.sentiment.value))

# Create graph the Covid-19 financial situation in Denmark
ggplot(covidfinancial, aes(x = Year, y = mean.sentiment.value)) +
  geom_line(color = "darkred", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(color = "darkred", size = 3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "blue", linewidth = 1) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 2015:2021) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, NA)) +
  labs(
    title = "Covid-19 Financial Situation",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Mean Sentiment"
  ) +
  theme_bw()
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'
